name: Extract CodeMirror 5 code editors (CodePen)
description: Extracts HTML, CSS, JS from CodePen pen editor pages. Editors are in DOM order: index 0=HTML, 1=CSS, 2=JS. IMPORTANT: First verify editors are loaded: evaluate_js('() => document.querySelectorAll(".CodeMirror").length') — should return 3. If 0, editors are not ready yet; call navigate again with wait_until='networkidle'. If result strings are empty after extraction, try the DOM line fallback instead.
code: () => { const cms = [...document.querySelectorAll('.CodeMirror')]; const extract = (el) => { const v = el?.CodeMirror?.getValue(); if (v) return v; return [...(el?.querySelectorAll('.CodeMirror-line') || [])].map(l => l.innerText).join('\n'); }; return { editor_count: cms.length, editor_0: extract(cms[0]) || '', editor_1: extract(cms[1]) || '', editor_2: extract(cms[2]) || '' }; }
